Features

Everything you need to grow faster

AI handles repetitive tasks so you can focus on growth.

🤖

AI Receptionist

Replies to Zalo & Facebook 24/7, never missing a message. Response under 3 seconds.

✍️

Content Creator

AI drafts 7 days of content on schedule. You just review and post.

📊

Smart CRM

Auto-saves customer profiles, classifies leads, retargets at the right moment.

📈

Real-time Reports

Visual dashboard. AI analyzes and suggests actions every week.

Pricing

Simple, transparent pricing

14-day free trial. Cancel anytime. No hidden fees.

Free
$0 /mo
  • ✓50 credits/month
  • ✓Basic AI Receptionist
  • ✓3 days content/month
  • ✓CRM: 50 contacts
Get started free
Starter
$8 /mo
  • ✓500 credits/month
  • ✓24/7 AI Receptionist
  • ✓7 days content/week
  • ✓Unlimited CRM
  • ✓Weekly reports
Try free 14 days
Most popular
Pro
$20 /mo
  • ✓2,000 credits/month
  • ✓Multi-channel (Zalo+FB+Web)
  • ✓Industry-tuned AI
  • ✓API access
  • ✓SLA 99.9%
Choose Pro

$120 /mo
  • ✓Unlimited credits
  • ✓Dedicated AI model

  • ✓1-on-1 onboarding
  • ✓SLA 99.99%

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Do I need to know how to code? +
No. The interface is fully visual — anyone can get started within 5 minutes.
Which industries are supported? +
Cafes, restaurants, spas, salons, gyms, fashion shops, convenience stores and most retail businesses.
What payment methods are accepted? +
Payment via Polar.sh with Visa/Mastercard. Global support, USD pricing.
Can I cancel my subscription? +
Cancel anytime with no penalty. Your data is retained for 30 days after cancellation.
Is my customer data safe? +
Runs on Cloudflare Workers with end-to-end encryption. Never shared with third parties.

Ready to let AI work for you?

Join 500+ businesses saving 20+ hours per week with OpenClaw.
